title: if you could change a single moment in evangelion
display_title: if you could change a single moment in evangelion
wikitext:
[]: if you could change a single moment in evangelion...             Quote Post by Puga » Tue Jan 22, 2008 12:16 am Imagine that you were given the chance to utterly fuck up scenes in the evangelion universe to make it insanely funny. What would you do to change an episode? note get as creative and insane as you can, the funnier the better. persoaly i would change the scene where Kaji dies so that we can see pen pen 1 was actually the killer. EVERYTHING COULD BE EXPLAINED (pictures are a nice back up for your insane imagination)

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Jan 22, 2008 12:20 am The scene where Asuka stays the night at Hikari's house. I would like to see them go at it. The scene where Shinji and Kaworu are in the bath together, and Kaworu makes a move. I would like to see them go at it. Also, I'd create a brand new scene. Rei finds the spare parts of the destroyed Rei clones, picks some up, and goes at it.

[]:             Quote Post by Puga » Tue Jan 22, 2008 12:33 am i think someone imagined what you said already Sorrry about broken link above but ONCE AGAIN ALL IS EXPLAINED

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Jan 22, 2008 12:38 am I've already done my insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Puga » Tue Jan 22, 2008 1:00 am NAveryW wrote: I've already done my insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Tue Jan 22, 2008 1:16 am The obvious answer is to have Shinji finish the job in Episode 9, but making it as discreet as possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jan 22, 2008 2:10 am NAveryW wrote: I've already done my insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Jan 22, 2008 3:31 am Shinji and Asuka fall in love with each other, this time they admit it and have sex in Episode 9. This scene happened when Asuka taught Shinji the Thermal Expansion thing, and Shinji looked embarrassed, but wanted to :see: her breasts-after this, they went to Misato's apartment.

[]:             Quote Post by jaychouf4n » Tue Jan 22, 2008 5:54 am I wanted to see Jet Alone get into battle with an angel and then get completely ripped apart, and then exploding throwing nuclear waste over kilometres, then the look of the JA project leader with a "my bad"

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jan 22, 2008 9:20 am jaychouf4n wrote: I wanted to see Jet Alone get into battle with an angel and then get completely ripped apart, and then exploding throwing nuclear waste over kilometres, then the look of the JA project leader with a "my bad"

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Tue Jan 22, 2008 10:29 am jaychouf4n wrote: I wanted to see Jet Alone get into battle with an angel and then get completely ripped apart, and then exploding throwing nuclear waste over kilometres, then the look of the JA project leader with a "my bad"

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Jan 22, 2008 11:12 am NAveryW wrote: I've already done my insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Tue Jan 22, 2008 12:51 pm Segata Sanshiro picks up GNR and the MP Evas and throws them into the asteroid belt, where they freeze and are ripped apart by meteors before they can can cause Third Impact. Then Ritsuko's brain is put in a gigantic robot body which promptly goes on a destructive rampage. Kaji II wakes up in the Kajiquarium, and transforms into Shin Bee Ranger Z, who fights Ritsuko-Bot in his transformable giant robot with the help of Batman and Margaret Thatcher.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Tue Jan 22, 2008 1:33 pm NAveryW wrote: I've already done my insanity.

[]:             Quote Post by Puga » Tue Jan 22, 2008 6:32 pm I would make Shiro Tokita (from the jet alone episode) be a regular charachter in evangelion and make him the lovable pervert that everyone know he is. He would always be around the camera control's and monitors from where he would stalk his prey and then deliver the ultimate anhialating comment of death causing and sound ZOMG! MULTI-TRACK DRIFTING![img]http://i274.photobucket.com/albums/jj260/puga855/shinji_multitrack.jpg reaction from anyone who heard it. This would be specially effective in the mayonaise scene in the end of evangelion, or Rei's almighty bitch slap, or kaworu's deviant sexual androgeneousness in the Nerv baths that just call for a well placed BOW-CHICKA-BOW-WOW[/img]
